name: io.github.KuudoAI/amazon_ads_mcp
description: Amazon Ads API MCP server for Amazon Advertising API

HOSTNAME.description: Hostname of a running Amazon Ads MCP HTTP deployment.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer credential required by the selected Amazon Ads MCP deployment.

AUTH_TOKEN.description: Kuudo API key, Openbridge refresh token, or deployment bearer token.
